title: notholaena hirsuta
intro: Notholaena hirsuta, also known as the hairy fern or hirsute fern, is a type of fern found in the southwestern United States, particularly in Arizona and New Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Notholaena hirsuta include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Notholaena hirsuta can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
